retry_reason: The put always succeeds; if the skb is freed, retrying is impossible and pointless.
contract_summary: This function drops a reference on the sk_buff, recording the drop reason with a trace event. After calling, the caller must not access the skb, as it may have been freed if the reference count reached zero. The return value indicates whether the skb is still alive (true) or freed (false). It is a release (put) operation, part of the skb lifecycle: the caller relinquishes its reference and ownership.
